creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Steffen. Please:

- Set the maintainer-approval flag on attachments (to +) to signify maintainer approval on patches for ports you are maintainer of.

- Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere in particular). For more infomation and instructions on testing, see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
